title: State machine verification: Rust lichen-link
description:
Add state machine verification to link layer.

Link layer states:
- Frame processing state
- Peer state (unknown, authenticating, authenticated)
- Replay window state

Files: rust/lichen-link/src/*.rs if exists, else skip

Use typestate for peer authentication state.
close_reason: Completed: added frame processing transition verification, replay-window Empty/Tracking state verification, peer authentication typestate, and runtime peer auth state tracking. Also fixed a review-found state ordering bug so a replay rejected after unpin cannot reauthenticate/re-pin the peer. Tests: cargo test -p lichen-link --features std,schnorr; cargo check -p lichen-link --no-default-features; cargo clippy -p lichen-link --features std,schnorr --all-targets -- -D warnings -A clippy::manual_is_multiple_of -A clippy::needless_borrows_for_generic_args; git diff --check. Review pass 1: no out-of-scope source edits or behavior regressions found. Review pass 2: found replay-after-unpin repin bug, fixed and covered by regression test.
